summary: Iteration 19 - Rubric Simplifier Distinction Band & Course Planner Scheduled Classes Schema Testing Complete. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend pages load correctly. Both fixes verified: (1) Rubric Simplifier now includes 'distinctionLooksLike' field in backend prompt and frontend displays DI badge in violet between HD and CR, (2) Course Planner extraction prompt includes expanded scheduled_classes schema (class_type, course_code, day_of_week, frequency, week_range, attendance_required) and frontend TimelineView renders classes as indigo cards with BookOpen icon.
passed_tests: POST /api/rubric/simplify with empty rubric_text returns 400 'Please paste your rubric text to simplify.'
Backend rubric prompt contains 'distinctionLooksLike' field in JSON template
Backend rubric prompt includes 'What a Distinction looks like in practice' instruction
Backend planner prompt contains expanded scheduled_classes schema (class_type, course_code, day_of_week, frequency, week_range, attendance_required)
Backend rubric error handling surfaces real errors (budget, timeout, JSON parse) instead of generic 'Failed to simplify'
Frontend RubricSimplifier.js displays DI (Distinction) badge with violet color
Frontend CoursePlanner.js renders scheduled classes with BookOpen icon and indigo styling
Frontend TimelineView shows combined 'X assessments + Y classes' count in week headers
Frontend loads correctly: Dashboard, Rubric Simplifier, Course Planner pages all accessible
critical_code_review_comments: FIX 1 (Scheduled Classes) - Backend prompt at /app/backend/routes/planner.py lines 119-129 correctly includes all expanded fields: class_type, course_code, day_of_week, frequency, week_range, attendance_required
FIX 1 (Scheduled Classes) - Frontend TimelineView at /app/frontend/src/pages/CoursePlanner.js lines 306-315 renders classes as indigo cards with BookOpen icon
FIX 1 (Scheduled Classes) - Frontend parseWeekRange function at lines 184-191 correctly parses 'Weeks 1-13' format to distribute classes across weeks
FIX 1 (Scheduled Classes) - Week headers at line 297 show combined count: 'X assessments + Y classes'
FIX 2 (Distinction Band) - Backend prompt at /app/backend/routes/tools.py line 141 includes 'distinctionLooksLike' in JSON template
FIX 2 (Distinction Band) - Backend system prompt at lines 101-102 instructs extraction of 'What a Distinction looks like in practice'
FIX 2 (Distinction Band) - Frontend at /app/frontend/src/pages/RubricSimplifier.js lines 196-199 displays grade bands in correct order: HD → DI → CR → P
FIX 2 (Distinction Band) - DI badge styled with violet color (bg-violet-500/10 text-violet-400)
FIX 2 (Error Handling) - Backend at lines 179-187 surfaces specific errors: budget/credits, timeout, JSON parse errors instead of generic message

mocked_apis.Stripe: Credit check BYPASSED for owner testing
mocked_apis.LLM Tools: Uses real Emergent LLM Key (funded) - NOT triggered during testing to preserve budget

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 complete. Two fixes verified: (1) Rubric Simplifier now extracts and displays Distinction (DI) grade band between HD and CR with violet styling. Backend prompt includes distinctionLooksLike field. Error handling surfaces real errors. (2) Course Planner extraction prompt includes expanded scheduled_classes schema with class_type, course_code, day_of_week, frequency, week_range, attendance_required. Frontend TimelineView renders classes as indigo cards with BookOpen icon, distributed across weeks based on week_range. Week headers show combined 'X assessments + Y classes' count. Cookie-based auth working. Test user: test@simplifii.com / test123.
